---
title: "Memory Subpart of BME 306 Study"
date: today
toc: true
autor: "Natallia Halai und Angela Textor"
format: 
  html:
    
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
    code_fold: true
project:
  
  output_dir: output
  execute_dir: project
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: true
execute: 
  warning: false
  error: false
  freeze: true
---


```{r}
#| label: libraries

library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(DHARMa)
library(GGally)

```



```{r}
#| label: dataset_loading


condition<-read_csv("data/Condition_participants.csv", 
    col_types = cols(participant_id = col_factor(levels = c("1", 
        "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", 
        "9")), Condition = col_factor(levels = c("Coffein", 
        "None"))))

all_olt <- read_csv("data/olt_processed/all_olt.csv", 
    col_types = cols(participant = col_factor(levels = c("1", 
        "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", 
        "9")), timepoint = col_factor(levels = c("1", 
        "2")), file = col_skip()))

condition<-condition%>%
  rename(participant="participant_id")

all_olt$condition<-rep(condition$Condition, each=2)

```


:::{comment_to_self}
-> timepoint 2 score under 0.6
-> time to answer correct??? definition 
-> how many memory pairs were there
-> where is the 3rd patients EEG -> want to see the improvement in memory with increased N3 phase
:::

```{r}
ggpairs(all_olt)
hist(all_olt$percent_correct)
hist(all_olt$time_for_answer_correct)
```


```{r}

ggplot(all_olt, aes(x=timepoint, y=percent_correct))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  geom_point() + #position = position_jitter(width = 0, height = 0.2)
  geom_line(aes(group = participant, color = participant)) 

  # geom_path(aes(group=participant, color=participant), lwd=2, 
            # position = position_jitter(width = 0, height = 0.2))


ggplot(all_olt, aes(x=timepoint, y=percent_correct))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  geom_point(aes(color=condition))+ #position = position_jitter(width = 0, height = 0.2)
  geom_line(aes(group = participant, color=condition)) 


# t-test takes differences (e.g. group 2 - 1)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
all_olt_new <- all_olt %>% 
  select(-time_for_answer_correct)



all_olt_wide <- all_olt_new %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = percent_correct) 

all_olt_wide %>% 
  group_by(participant) %>% 
  reframe(extra_diff = `2`-`1`,
          x = factor(0)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y = extra_diff, x = x)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "red") +
  geom_point(aes(color = participant), size = 2) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    y = "Response difference group 2-1"
  )

t.test(all_olt_wide$`1`, all_olt_wide$`2`, paired=TRUE)
#no statistically significant difference -> also not in boxplots
```
